meta.title: Kling 2.1 AI Video Generator | Image to Video | OpenCreator
meta.description: Transform static images into stunning videos with Kling 2.1 AI. Professional-quality motion synthesis with natural physics simulation, dynamic facial expressions, and flexible duration options. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Transform static images into fluid, natural-looking videos with Kling AI v2.1. Developed by Kuaishou, this powerful image-to-video model delivers professional-quality motion synthesis with realistic physics simulation and dynamic facial expressions.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Kling 2.1 a powerful choice for AI video generation

motion.title: Natural Motion Synthesis
motion.description: Advanced 3D spatiotemporal attention mechanism accurately models complex movements, ensuring videos adhere to real-world physics.

facial.title: Dynamic Facial Expressions
facial.description: Excels in generating life-like facial expressions and accurate movements, making characters more engaging and realistic.

multiRef.title: Multi-Reference Support
multiRef.description: Support for up to 4 input images for multi-image generation, enabling consistent character and scene creation.

duration.title: Flexible Duration
duration.description: Choose between 5 or 10 second video outputs to match your content needs, from quick social clips to longer narratives.

effects.title: Special Effects
effects.description: Built-in special effects including hug, kiss, heart gesture, squish, and expansion for creative storytelling.

quality.title: Quality Preservation
quality.description: Maintains fine details and textures from source images while adding natural, fluid motion to bring them to life.

0.question: What is Kling 2.1 and who developed it?
0.answer: Kling 2.1 is an advanced AI-powered video generation model developed by Kuaishou. It transforms reference images and text prompts into high-definition, cinematic videos using sophisticated 3D spatiotemporal attention mechanisms and diffusion transformer architectures.

1.question: What types of content can I create with Kling 2.1?
1.answer: Kling 2.1 excels at creating e-commerce product videos, social media content, brand advertising, fashion showcases, UGC-style promotions, and entertainment content. It supports diverse content types including people, animals, objects, and scenes.

2.question: How long can Kling 2.1 videos be?
2.answer: Kling 2.1 supports two duration options: 5 seconds and 10 seconds. This flexibility allows you to create quick social clips or longer narrative sequences depending on your needs.

3.question: What image formats does Kling 2.1 support?
3.answer: Kling 2.1 accepts JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, and AVIF image formats as input. The output is always in MP4 format with up to 1080p HD resolution.

4.question: Can I use multiple reference images?
4.answer: Yes! Kling 2.1 supports multi-image generation with up to 4 input images. This feature enables consistent character and scene creation across your video content.

5.question: How does Kling 2.1 compare to other AI video models?
5.answer: Kling 2.1 stands out for its realistic physics simulation, dynamic facial expressions, and multi-reference support. While models like Veo 3 offer better audio generation and Sora 2 supports longer durations, Kling 2.1 excels in image-to-video quality and affordability.

6.question: What is the maximum video length for Kling 2.1?
6.answer: Kling 2.1 supports maximum video lengths of 5 seconds or 10 seconds at 1080p HD resolution. Choose 5s for quick social clips or 10s for longer narrative sequences.

7.question: What is Kling AI 2.1 maximum video duration?
7.answer: The maximum video duration for Kling AI 2.1 is 10 seconds. You can select either 5-second or 10-second duration options when generating videos on OpenCreator.

8.question: Can I try Kling 2.1 for free on OpenCreator?
8.answer: Yes! New users receive free credits upon registration, which can be used to try Kling 2.1. This lets you test the physics simulation and facial expression capabilities before subscribing.

9.question: What are Kling AI 2.1 key features?
9.answer: Key features include: natural motion synthesis with 3D spatiotemporal attention, dynamic facial expressions, multi-reference support (up to 4 images), special effects (hug, kiss, heart gesture), physics simulation, and 1080p HD output.

10.question: How does Kling 2.1 compare to Kling 2.5 Turbo?
10.answer: Kling 2.5 Turbo offers enhanced prompt adherence, superior motion quality, and 30% lower cost than 2.1. However, Kling 2.1 remains popular for its proven reliability and special effects features. Choose 2.5 for action scenes; 2.1 for consistent quality.

11.question: Does Kling 2.1 support text-to-video?
11.answer: Yes, Kling 2.1 supports both image-to-video and text-to-video generation. You can create videos from text prompts alone or combine text with reference images for more control.

12.question: What special effects does Kling 2.1 offer?
12.answer: Kling 2.1 includes built-in special effects: hug, kiss, heart gesture, squish, and expansion. These effects add creative storytelling options without additional editing.
